A01.notes: Excellent chibi proportions, glasses preserved from selfie, clean pastel background, premium vinyl figure look

A02.notes: Strong Pixar aesthetic with warm lighting and expressive eyes

A03.notes: Good manga linework and dynamic energy, identity somewhat abstracted by style

A04.notes: Museum-quality graphite portrait with visible pencil technique and paper texture

A05.notes: Excellent clay texture with visible sculpting details, sweater texture outstanding

A06.notes: Good retro aesthetic, synthwave background could be more dramatic

A07.notes: Painted illustration quality achieved, retro-futuristic elements present

A08.notes: Outstanding woodblock print authenticity — bold ink outlines, Prussian blue palette, Mt. Fuji, cherry blossoms, red seal stamp. Paper texture visible.

A09.notes: Luminous watercolor quality with visible paper grain and color bleeds

A10.notes: K-Pop beauty standards well applied, good studio lighting and color grading

A11.notes: Magnificent royal portrait with oil painting technique, dramatic chiaroscuro

A12.notes: Perfect 90s yearbook aesthetic — laser beam background, period outfit, film grain, Kodak Gold warmth. Previously validated.

A13.notes: Strong editorial lighting and fashion styling, magazine-grade quality

A14.notes: Stunning neon aesthetic — cybernetic augmentations, rain-slicked environment, magenta/cyan lighting, identity clearly preserved

B01.notes: Professional studio quality with clean lighting and natural skin

B02.notes: Clean white background, regulation-compliant composition, natural skin

B03.notes: Outstanding — golden retriever in tailored suit with study background, dignified expression, realistic fur-to-fabric transition

B04.notes: All 9 stickers present in 3x3 grid, consistent identity across all, distinct expressions, different outfits, clean sticker design

B05.notes: Stylized portrait suitable for avatar use, identity recognizable

C01.notes: Adorable kawaii aesthetic with warm pastel tones and plush texture

C02.notes: 2x2 grid achieved with different expressions, manga effects present, colorful

C03.notes: VOGUE text perfectly rendered, luxurious setting, golden robe, sunglasses, editorial quality. All cover text accurate.

D01.notes: Identity well preserved, blazer rendered naturally. Background changed somewhat (model limitation for pixel-level editing). Good for demo.

D02.notes: Hairstyle changed naturally, face preserved. Some background alteration (known limitation).

D03.notes: Background replaced effectively, subject edges natural, lighting reasonably consistent

E01.notes: Text perfectly rendered, professional graphic design, warm color palette, ready for posting

E02.notes: ALL text correct — 'SPRING AUDITIONS', 'UC Berkeley Music Society', date/location/time. Bold geometric design, clear hierarchy.

E03.notes: 4-panel layout achieved, character consistent across panels, clear narrative progression

E04.notes: Authentic hand-drawn look with markers and crayons, organized sections, colorful and charming

E05.notes: Breathtaking Ghibli-style watercolor — floating islands, sky whales, golden hour lighting, perfect composition. Gallery-worthy.

F01.notes: Cinematic product photography with premium advertising quality, macro detail, beautiful bokeh

F02.notes: 3x3 grid, consistent identity, different expressions, clean sticker design

F03.notes: Scandinavian minimalist style well applied, photorealistic rendering, some layout changes

F04.notes: Perfect flat vector logo — mountain+sun icon, 'ALPINE' correctly spelled, navy+gold palette, minimal and scalable

F05.notes: Collectible figure aesthetic achieved, product photography style, dynamic pose

F06.notes: Perfect coloring book page — clean black lines on white, enclosed areas, intricate details, fairy/mushroom/cottage scene exactly as described

scoring_criteria.prompt_adherence: How well the output matches the template's intended output
scoring_criteria.identity_preservation: For photo-based: facial/feature fidelity. For text-based: text accuracy
scoring_criteria.visual_quality: Overall image quality, resolution, absence of artifacts
scoring_criteria.style_accuracy: How accurately the target style/aesthetic is achieved
